findings.title: Hardcoded database DSN and SMTP credentials
findings.description: Full PostgreSQL DSN with embedded password and SMTP credentials stored as package-level variables

findings.title: Database DSN and stack trace leaked in error responses
findings.description: Report generation handler returns raw error messages, Go debug stack trace, and database DSN in error responses

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes full user records including passwords
findings.description: Debug endpoint serializes complete User struct including Password field to any authenticated user

findings.title: Password reset token and SMTP server returned in API response
findings.description: Password reset token and internal SMTP hostname returned directly in API response

findings.title: Config endpoint exposes all infrastructure credentials
findings.description: Admin config endpoint returns full database DSN with password and SMTP credentials
